priorities.stage2_impact: Stage1 DB catalog(pdf_documents) missing current PDF manifests; Stage1→Stage2 PDF handoff/gate can undercount documents.
priorities.why_now: Stage2 DB-centered pipeline and PDF gate depend on current structured index.
priorities.safe_action: Keep manifests as-is; prepare audit manifest and rerun Stage1 DB sync/pdf index once approved.

priorities.stage2_impact: raw_artifacts authoritative DB snapshot is stale for changed files; Stage2 DB mirror can ingest old meta content.
priorities.why_now: Stage2 reads stage1_raw_archive.sqlite3, not live raw tree.
priorities.safe_action: Generate delta manifest first; then single sync pass instead of manual overwrite.

priorities.stage2_impact: Structured PDF page counts disagree with pdf_pages rows; page-level quality/reporting can drift.
priorities.why_now: Files exist, so this is quality/index repair rather than raw loss.
priorities.safe_action: Targeted page index audit/rebuild after sync.

priorities.stage2_impact: Some live raw files are absent from DB snapshot; only a subset is canonical for Stage2.
priorities.why_now: Need to separate canonical unsynced artifacts from deferable noise/excluded inputs.
priorities.safe_action: Use classification manifest; sync only after audit, ignore noncanonical buckets in Stage2 readiness.

priorities.stage2_impact: Potential duplicate document lineage; does not block current Stage1→Stage2 DB refresh.
priorities.why_now: Needs alias policy before rename/doc_key rewrite.
priorities.safe_action: Alias map only; no rename/doc_key rewrite.

priorities.stage2_impact: Path normalization mismatch candidate for a few docs; not a broad block.
priorities.why_now: Likely path-key mismatch, not missing file body.
priorities.safe_action: Audit path normalization during sync/reindex; do not move files.
